pages.text: A Forest Skyseed takes after the biome it lands in — grassy and wooded over temperate land, but open grass over plains, and even a treeless dirt-and-sand patch over a desert. Radius 7–10, flat-ish domed top, rocky underside. Coal is common in its core; iron a little rarer.
$(bold)Where it lands matters$()$(br)$(li)Forest: oak and birch.$(li)Savanna: acacia.$(li)Plains: open grass, the odd tree.$(li)Desert / badlands: dirt and sand, dead bushes — no trees.
